params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\install_ollama.ps1' : 'which ollama && echo OLLAMA_ALREADY_INSTALLED || (curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && echo OLLAMA_INSTALLED)'}}

params.html: ⬇️ Descargando modelo de IA (puede tardar varios minutos)...

params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\pull_model.ps1' : (ram < 6 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:1b' : ram < 12 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:3b' : 'ollama pull llama3.1:8b')}}

params.html: 🐍 Creando entorno virtual e instalando dependencias Python...

params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\setup_venv.ps1' : 'python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip --quiet && venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && echo DEPS_OK'}}

{{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "@(\"data/agents\",\"data/prompts/system\",\"data/sessions\",\"data/exports\",\"data/brands\",\"data/campaigns\",\"data/audit\") | ForEach-Object { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $_ | Out-Null }; Write-Host DIRS_OK"' : 'mkdir -p data/agents data/prompts/system data/sessions data/exports data/brands data/campaigns data/audit'}}
{{platform === 'win32' ? 'if not exist data\\agents\\agents.json copy defaults\\agents.json data\\agents\\agents.json' : 'cp defaults/agents.json data/agents/agents.json 2>/dev/null || true'}}

{{platform === 'win32' ? 'for %f in (defaults\\prompts\\*.md) do if not exist data\\prompts\\system\\%~nxf copy "%f" data\\prompts\\system\\' : 'cp defaults/prompts/*.md data/prompts/system/ 2>/dev/null || true'}}

params.text: {{JSON.stringify({version: '0.1.0', installedAt: new Date().toISOString(), platform: platform, defaultModel: ram < 6 ? 'llama3.2:1b' : ram < 12 ? 'llama3.2:3b' : 'llama3.1:8b'}, null, 2)}}

params.html:
✅ Instalación completada

Haz click en Iniciar para comenzar a usar CSS Brand Assistant.
